notes: topic_separation=1.00 topic_continuation=1.00 retrieval_precision=1.00 archival_fidelity=1.00 cross_topic=0.50 topic_drift=0.00; drift=0.00 because chunker over-splits (4+ topics); cross_topic=0.50 because bridging msgs land in only one topic

description: Add topic granularity guidance to chunker
notes: topic_drift improved 0.00→0.50; now creating 1 or 3 topics for drift conv instead of 4+; all other scores maintained

description: Strengthen cross-topic message rule to MUST include in all applicable chunks
notes: cross_topic improved 0.50→0.67 (1/3 runs hit 1.00); topic_drift unchanged at 0.50

description: Refine drift guidance: situation+emotional-state=same, new plan=new topic
notes: topic_drift improved 0.50→0.83; cross_topic unchanged at 0.67; both still noisy (stochastic)

description: Reframe cross-topic rule with retrieval perspective + examples
notes: Regression: both cross_topic AND topic_drift dropped to 0.50 consistently. Specific examples in prompt ("Portugal trip on July 14th") likely contaminated model's behavior. Reverted to best-v3.

description: Replace cross-topic rule with facts/constraints/context framing
notes: No improvement vs exp4. cross_topic=0.50, topic_drift=0.50 consistently. The "MUST" + original example in exp3 is better. Reverted.
Severe regression: topic_drift=0.17 (4+ topics created). Step-by-step without embedded granularity rules re-introduced over-splitting. Reverted to best-v3.

description: Add interruption rule: check interrupting messages for topic-A constraints
notes: cross_topic 0.67→1.00 (all 3 runs), topic_drift 0.83→1.00 (all 3 runs). retrieval_precision dropped slightly (0.92) in one run — noise. EXCEEDS 0.95: switching to 5-run robustness mode.
5-run: cross_topic avg=0.90/min=0.50, topic_drift avg=0.80/min=0.50. Target: min-composite > 0.90.

description: Add "if 3 candidates, merge same-root-situation" to drift guidance
notes: cross_topic min improved 0.50→1.00; but topic_continuation got a new failure (0.50 in 1 run) and topic_drift avg dropped 0.80→0.70. Net regression. "Same person" criterion was too broad. Reverted.

description: Refine drift guidance: "burnout belongs with deadlines; sabbatical with duration/destinations=new"
notes: cross_topic improved to 1.00 consistently (min 1.00); topic_drift regressed 0.80→0.50 consistently; but min-composite improved 0.83→0.88. Keeping for better floor score.

notes: min-composite improved 0.88→0.92. cross_topic solid at 1.00 min. topic_drift improved 0.50→0.60 avg (1/5 runs hit 1.00). Still 4/5 runs creating 3 topics from drift conv.

description: Add emotional-escalation guidance: same situation = same topic even as intensity shifts
notes: avg composite improved 0.93→0.95. topic_drift improved 0.60→0.70 avg (2/5 hit 1.00). cross_topic maintained 1.00. min-composite held at 0.92.

description: User hint: make non-contiguous messageIndices more explicit
notes: Big regression. cross_topic dropped 1.00→0.80 (min 0.50), topic_drift 0.70→0.50. Model started over-gathering messages. Reverted to best-v11.

notes: Regression: cross_topic dropped 1.00→0.90 (min 0.50), topic_drift 0.70→0.50. Reverted to best-v11.

notes: min-composite same but avg composite regressed 0.95→0.93. topic_drift 0.70→0.60. Not better. Reverted to best-v11.

notes: Big regression: cross_topic 1.00→0.80, topic_continuation 1.00→0.90, min-composite 0.92→0.75. Rule 3 was load-bearing. Reverted to best-v11.

Only weakness: life_transition Maya topic match (topicKeywords fix applied). This is the new baseline — prior scores are on different benchmark.
